info.title: Pathway Analysis Service
info.description: Provides an API for pathway over-representation and expression analysis as well as species comparison tool.

tags.name: report
tags.description: Retrieves report files in PDF format

tags.name: download
tags.description: Methods to download different views of a result

get.summary: The name of current database

406.description: Not acceptable according to the accept headers sent in the request

get.summary: The version number of current database

406.description: Not acceptable according to the accept headers sent in the request

get.summary: Downloads found identifiers for a given analysis and resource
get.description: The identifiers are filtered by the selected resource. The filename is the one to be suggested in the download window.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The token associated with the data to download

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: the file name for the downloaded information

404.description: No result corresponding to the token was found

410.description: Result deleted due to a new data release

get.summary: Downloads a list of the not found identifiers
get.description: Those identifiers from the user sample that are not present up to the current data version. The filename is the one to be suggested in the download window.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The token associated with the data to download

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: the file name for the downloaded information

404.description: No result corresponding to the token was found

410.description: Result deleted due to a new data release

get.summary: Downloads all hit pathways for a given analysis
get.description: The results are filtered by the selected resource. The filename is the one to be suggested in the download window.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The token associated with the data to download

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: the file name for the downloaded information

404.description: No result corresponding to the token was found

410.description: Result deleted due to a new data release

get.summary: Returns the complete result in json format
get.description: The results are not filtered by any means. The json file contains the whole stored result based on chosen analysis options and submitted data.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The token associated with the data to query

parameters.name: importableOnly
parameters.description: Only include resources which can be later imported

404.description: No result corresponding to the token was found

410.description: Result deleted due to a new data release

get.summary: Returns the complete result in json format (gzipped)
get.description: The results are not filtered by any means. The json file contains the whole stored result based on chosen analysis options and submitted data.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The token associated with the data to query

404.description: No result corresponding to the token was found

410.description: Result deleted due to a new data release

get.summary: Analyse the identifier over the different species in the database
get.description: Use page and pageSize to reduce the amount of data retrieved. Use sortBy and order to sort the result by your preferred option. The resource field will filter the results to show only those corresponding to the preferred molecule type (TOTAL includes all the different molecules type)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier of the element to be retrieved

parameters.name: interactors
parameters.description: Include interactors

parameters.name: species
parameters.description: list of species to filter the result (accepts taxonomy ids, species names and dbId)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: pathways per page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: page number

parameters.name: pValue
parameters.description: defines the pValue threshold. Only hit pathway with pValue equals or below the threshold will be returned

parameters.name: includeDisease
parameters.description: set to 'false' to exclude the disease pathways from the result (it does not alter the statistics)

parameters.name: min
parameters.description: minimum number of contained entities per pathway (takes into account the resource)

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: maximum number of contained entities per pathway (takes into account the resource)

parameters.name: importableOnly
parameters.description: Filters resources to only includes importable ones

get.summary: Analyse the identifier over the different species in the database and projects the result to Homo Sapiens
get.description: The projection is calculated by the orthologous slot in the Reactome database. Use page and pageSize to reduce the amount of data retrieved. Use sortBy and order to sort the result by your preferred option. The resource field will filter the results to show only those corresponding to the preferred molecule type (TOTAL includes all the different molecules type)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier of the element to be retrieved

parameters.name: interactors
parameters.description: Include interactors

parameters.name: species
parameters.description: list of species to filter the result (accepts taxonomy ids, species names and dbId)

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: pathways per page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: page number

parameters.name: pValue
parameters.description: defines the pValue threshold. Only hit pathway with pValue equals or below the threshold will be returned

parameters.name: includeDisease
parameters.description: set to 'false' to exclude the disease pathways from the result (it does not alter the statistics)

parameters.name: min
parameters.description: minimum number of contained entities per pathway (takes into account the resource)

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: maximum number of contained entities per pathway (takes into account the resource)

parameters.name: importableOnly
parameters.description: Filters resources to only includes importable ones

post.summary: Analyse the post identifiers over the different species
post.description: Use page and pageSize to reduce the amount of data retrieved. Use sortBy and order to sort the result by your preferred option. The resource field will filter the results to show only those corresponding to the preferred molecule type (TOTAL includes all the different molecules type). The token which includes analysis results are available for 7 days after your last execution, you have to re-generate it if you would like to keep using the token.

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: maximum number of contained entities per pathway (takes into account the resource)

parameters.name: importableOnly
parameters.description: Filters resources to only includes importable ones

get.summary: Downloads a report for a given pathway analysis result
get.description: This method provides a report for a given pathway analysis result in a PDF document. This document contains data about the analysis itself followed by the pathways overview and the most significant pathways overlaid with the analysis result. Users can download and store this information in a convenient format to be checked in the future when the 'token' is not longer available.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The token associated with the data to query

parameters.name: species
parameters.description: The species for which results will be reported

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The name of the file to be downloaded

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: Number of pathways reported (max 50)

parameters.name: importableOnly
parameters.description: Filters resources to only includes importable ones

404.description: No result corresponding to the token was found

410.description: Result deleted due to a new data release

get.summary: Compares Homo sapiens to the specified species
get.description: Use page and pageSize to reduce the amount of data retrieved. Use sortBy and order to sort the result by your preferred option. The resource field will filter the results to show only those corresponding to the preferred molecule type (TOTAL includes all the different molecules type)

parameters.name: species
parameters.description: The dbId of the species to compare to

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: pathways per page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: page number

parameters.name: pValue
parameters.description: defines the pValue threshold. Only hit pathway with pValue equals or below the threshold will be returned

parameters.name: min
parameters.description: minimum number of contained entities per pathway (takes into account the resource)

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: maximum number of contained entities per pathway (takes into account the resource)

parameters.name: importableOnly
parameters.description: Filters resources to only includes importable ones

404.description: Species identifier does not match with any of the species in the current data

parameters.name: max

parameters.description: Filters resources to only includes importable ones

requestBody.description: input A comma separated list with the identifiers of the pathways of interest (NOTE: is plain text, not json)

get.summary: Returns the page where the corresponding pathway is taking into account the passed parameters
get.description: Useful when implementing UI with tables showing the results in a page way and the user needs to know in which page a certain pathway is present for a given set of sorting and filtering options.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The token associated with the data to query

parameters.name: pathway
parameters.description: The database identifier of the pathway of interest

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: pathways per page

parameters.name: pValue
parameters.description: defines the pValue threshold. Only hit pathway with pValue equals or below the threshold will be returned

parameters.name: includeDisease
parameters.description: set to 'false' to exclude the disease pathways from the result (it does not alter the statistics)

parameters.name: min
parameters.description: minimum number of contained entities per pathway (takes into account the resource)

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: maximum number of contained entities per pathway (takes into account the resource)

parameters.name: importableOnly
parameters.description: Filters resources to only includes importable ones

404.description: No result corresponding to the token was found

410.description: Result deleted due to a new data release

get.summary: Returns a list of binned hit pathway sizes associated with the token
get.description: Each bin has a key that determines the range by multiplying it by the binSize: [key x binSize - key+1 x binSize). For example, for a binSize of 100 and the range for the bin with key equals 8 is [800 - 900)

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: The token associated with the data to query

schema.description: defines the size of each bin for the classification (min: 100)

parameters.name: species
parameters.description: list of species to filter the result (accepts taxonomy ids, species names and dbId)

parameters.name: pValue
parameters.description: defines the pValue threshold. Only hit pathway with pValue equals or below the threshold will be returned

parameters.name: includeDisease
parameters.description: set to 'false' to exclude the disease pathways from the result (it does not alter the statistics)

404.description: No result corresponding to the token was found

410.description: Result deleted due to a new data release

post.summary: Returns the reaction ids of the pathway ids sent by post that are present in the original result
post.description: It filters the submitted list and retrieves back only those that at least one of the participating molecules has been hit with the user submitted data.

get.summary: Returns the reaction ids of the provided pathway id that are present in the original result
get.description: For a given pathway it returns the identifiers (dbId) of the reactions in the pathway that have been hit with the sample taking into account their participating molecules.

parameters.name: pValue
